titleStmt.title: SII 26.715: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 715. (A.R. No. 664 of 1909.) TIRUNEḌUṄGAḶAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: North, west, and south walls of the central shrine in the temple of Neḍuṅgaḷanāthasvāmin.

p.hi: Vīrapratāpa Bujabalarāya Immaḍi Tammayadēva-Mahārāya, son of Sāḷuva Narasiṁha: Ś. 1422 Durmati, Mēsha (Chittirai) ba, 11, Friday (Aviṭṭam). Irregular = 1501 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places.
It commences with a Sanskrit verse engraved in Grantha referring to the record as the order of Ādichaṇḍēśvara.

It records the founding of a village named Vīrama[ra*]śanallūr after a certain Sōmaya Vīramaraśar who is described as Ayyaṉ and as the “lord of the southern oceans”, and for his merit, probably by Svāmi Naraśaṉāyakkar, by converting Vaḍapuṟakkuḍi in Kiḷiyūr-nāḍu. It also records that this village was gifted to the temple of the god Tiruneḍuṅgaḷam-uḍaiya-tambirāṉ of Dakshiṇa-Kayilāyam alias Niḻalār Śōlaivaṉam in Vaḍakavi-nāḍu in Pāṇḍikulāśaṉi-vaḷanāḍu to provide for the midnight worship, for the worship on the days when Makhā asterism fell and for repairs to the temple. It is stated that this village was given to the Talaiyāri Timmaṉā[yakkar] of the place as saṟuvamānya stipulating that he should carry out the object of the gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śvabhamastu Etat śāsanamāddyasya ḷaravim maheśvaraḥ . Ādicaṇḍeśvarājjeyam . nittyakallyāṇameva ca . svastiśrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran harihararāyavipāṭaṉ pāṣaikkut tappuvarāyarkaṇṭaṉ muvarāyarkaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu kuṭātāṉ pū Uttaracatucamuttiṟātipati ciṟivirappiṟatāpa Irācātirācaṉ Irācaparamecuraṉ Emmaṇṭalamum tiṟaikoṇṭu Iḻam tiṟaikoṇṭu
kecaveṭṭai kaṇṭa Aruḷiya śrībhiviṟappiṟatāpa pucavelarāya Ippaṭi tammayatevamakā Irāyar piṟuttuvirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 2 10 2ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa tuṉmati samvassarattu meṣanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu Ekāteciyum cukkiṟavāra ṭattuṉāḷ pāṇṭikulācaṉivaḷanāṭṭu vaṭakavināṭṭu dakṣaṇakayilāyam Āṉa niḻalārcolaivaṉam Uṭaiyār
tiruneṭuṅkaḷamuṭaiya tampirāṉāṟku tiruvatticāmak kaṭṭaḷaikkum makapūcai tiruppaṇikku viṭṭa cuvāmi naracāṉāyakkar dakṣaṇa camuttiṟātipati Ayyaṉ comayaviramaracar taṉmam Āka kiḷiyūrnāṭṭil vaṭapuṟakkuṭiyai viramaracanallūr Eṉṟu kaṭṭi talaiyāri timmaṉā kku kuṭuttu Avvūr nāṉkellaikkuḷppaṭṭa nañcai puñcai nattam ceyttalaittiṭal kuḷam koṭṭam māvaṭai maravaṭa Itil Inta mu viramarai
ccariṭai maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa maruvātiyum caṉtiṟātittavaraiyum caṟuvamāṉṉiyam Āka Aṉupavittukkoḷḷavum makapūcai tiruppaṇikkuṟaiccal Aṟanaṭattavum Iṉta taṉ(ma)mattukku Iyātoruttar Akutam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkai ka(ā)raiyile �ṉṟa pāvattilum kuruvatai paṇṇiṉa pāvattile poka kaṭavarkaḷ Ākavum Itukku Akitam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ Erivāy narakatti poka kaṭavarkaḷ Ākavum §
Digital edition of SII 26.715 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
